title: Fight Anti Muslimism by Declaring yourself Muslim

enrichment.summary: Kyle announces he declared himself a Sufi Muslim on Facebook as an act of solidarity against anti-Muslim sentiment, drawing an analogy to the 'I am Spartacus' scene. He discusses it casually, mentions his birth religion had some connection to a yoga commune in Hawaii, and frames it as a temporary dabbling rather than a permanent commitment.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: oppose it by declaring yourself Muslim as an act of solidarity
views Sufis positively as the 'nice Muslims' known for whirling dervish practices
treating the Muslim declaration as temporary dabbling, not a permanent conversion
eventually wants to create a 'local Catholicism' project, mentioned as a future idea

entities: Krishna (mentioned in passing re: birth religion)
